summary: RON Compliance Engine feature testing complete. All backend APIs working (22/22 passed). Frontend dashboard loads correctly with state rules grid, violations list, and activity log.
critical_code_review_comments: Good: 51 state rules correctly defined in RON_STATE_RULES (50 states + DC)
Good: State status categories properly implemented (full, limited, pending, prohibited)
Good: CA and LA correctly marked as 'limited' with restricted document types
Good: SC correctly marked as 'prohibited' with no RON authorization
Good: Biometric verification requirement tracked for NY and CA
Good: Witness requirement tracked for LA (2 witnesses)
Good: Max signers per session enforced (NY=6, CA=5, LA=5, others=10)
Good: Validation results are logged to ron_compliance_logs MongoDB collection
Good: Admin-only endpoints properly check user role before returning data
Good: Public endpoints (/states, /states/{code}, /stats) don't require auth
Good: Frontend has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Good: Search filter works for state name and code
Good: Status filter buttons (All, Full RON, Limited, Pending, Prohibited) work correctly
Good: State cards expand to show detailed rules (effective date, ID requirements, witnesses, recording, max signers)
seed_data_creation: Created test validation logs prefixed with TEST_ for testing (auto-cleanup not implemented)
context_for_next_testing_agent: RON Compliance Engine fully tested. State rules are in-memory in ron_compliance_service.py. Validation logs stored in MongoDB ron_compliance_logs collection. Public endpoints don't need auth: /api/compliance/ron/states, /api/compliance/ron/states/{code}, /api/compliance/ron/stats. Auth required: /api/compliance/ron/validate. Admin-only: /api/compliance/ron/violations, /api/compliance/ron/activity. Rate limit on /api/auth/login is 10/min - use token caching to avoid rate limits.

backend.GET /api/compliance/ron/states: WORKING - Returns 51 jurisdictions with stats (48 full, 2 limited, 0 pending, 1 prohibited, 98% coverage)
backend.GET /api/compliance/ron/states/FL: WORKING - Florida full RON rules with effective date 2020-01-01
backend.GET /api/compliance/ron/states/CA: WORKING - California limited with biometric + restricted doc types
backend.GET /api/compliance/ron/states/NY: WORKING - New York with biometric requirement

POST /api/compliance/ron/validate.CA_affidavit: WORKING - compliant: true with limited/biometric warnings
POST /api/compliance/ron/validate.NY_affidavit: WORKING - compliant: true with biometric warning

backend.GET /api/compliance/ron/activity: WORKING - Admin-only, returns all activity with summary stats
backend.non_admin_403: WORKING - demo user gets 403 on admin endpoints
backend.validation_logging: WORKING - Validations logged to ron_compliance_logs collection

frontend.state_rules_tab: WORKING - Shows searchable, filterable state grid
frontend.state_card_expansion: WORKING - Shows effective date, ID requirements, witnesses, recording, max signers
frontend.violations_tab: WORKING - Shows compliance failures with error messages
frontend.activity_log_tab: WORKING - Shows validation history with pass rate
frontend.admin_dashboard_ron_btn: WORKING - RON Compliance button links to /admin/ron-compliance
